title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Sodexo India

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Sodexo India
jsonLd.description:
Sodexo India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Gurgaon. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Sodexo India:
Sodexo India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Crisis Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sodexo India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
